And so, you know, I need to go back, listen and read the transcripts from the last several coaching calls, write down the questions and contrive two or three stories in order to make those points. Because all I was doing before is just trying to tell them, all right, this is what you do. And that was a big mistake. And, you know, obviously I saw the, I noticed the pattern, but didn't get the reasoning behind the pattern. And I think that's what this entire program did. I think in my writing, I've had a concern that I'm hitting them too hard and trying to spur them into action more than I need, than I should be. And so that was, you know, because I'm trying to figure out how much motivation to give versus personality and self-aggrandizement. And I think I've been way too little on the self-aggrandizement and way too much on the motivation. I think that's a fair assessment. I think your connectivity is getting better. You are prone to tell stories that are good stories, but really don't make the point that you want them to make. And then you are stretching really far to connect them.
